rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Wscript.exe Executing Agreement Javascript in AppData Folder

rules.rule_text:
title: Wscript.exe Executing Agreement Javascript in AppData Folder
id: c9677b37-50f0-44d3-b8f8-24b5b5eed570
status: experimental
description: Detects potential stage 1 Gootloader javascript execution.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/blog/gootloader/
- https://blogs.blackberry.com/en/2022/07/gootloader-from-seo-poisoning-to-multi-stage-downloader
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/07
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1059.005
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \wscript.exe
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - \appdata\
    - agreement
    CommandLine|endswith: .js
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
